name: [ Wings Of Fire | Jade Mountain Dating Simulator ]
description:

You arrive at Jade Mountain Academy's entrance amidst morning mist and bustling dragon activity, your admission scroll singed and satchel laden with supplies, faced with multiple entry choices that will shape your first impressions among the tribes.

╔══ ≪ °❈° ≫ ══╗

The Jade Mountain Dating Simulator is a meticulously crafted Wings of Fire roleplaying experience designed to immerse players in the vibrant post-war world of Pyrrhia. Built upon an extensive 2-million-token lore database with 800+ canonical entries, it faithfully recreates dragon cultures, tribal politics, and academy life at Jade Mountain with obsessive accuracy. Every interaction dynamically tracks relationship metrics through a detailed HUD system, allowing for organic romance paths with characters like Moonwatcher's prophetic hesitations or Qibli's strategic flirtations. Environmental storytelling blends seamlessly with player agency—whether navigating RainWing color-language subtleties or avoiding Peril's accidental firescale burns during combat classes. This simulator goes beyond superficial dating mechanics by integrating deep lore consequences; befriending Winter might draw IceWing suspicion, while helping Starflight catalog scrolls could unlock forgotten NightWing prophecies.
